description: A published piece of content, such as a video, article, or post, created and distributed on a media platform

creator.description: Name or handle of the creator who published this work

platform.description: Platform where the work was published

publish_date.description: Date when the work was published, in YYYY-MM-DD format

format.description: Content format of this work, e.g. 短视频, 图文, 播客

performance_metrics.description: Key performance indicators for this work
